c1.speaker: milo
c1.line: Mr. Gibbons! Perfect timing. I'm surveilling the fruit stall. Gino gave a customer TWO free plums today. Two! Nobody's that generous. I'm building a file.

c2.speaker: narrator
c2.line: Milo brandishes a notebook labeled CRIMES? — question mark included. Every entry is written in red ink. Very red. Very familiar red.

c3.speaker: gary
c3.line: That's a lot of red ink, Milo.

c4.speaker: milo
c4.line: Red means URGENT. All crimes are urgent, Mr. Gibbons, that's what makes them crimes. You want to see my file on the pigeons? They're divorced. It's a whole thing.
